evals.expected_output: Triggers skill-health-audit and generates a structured skill health report with delete/merge/keep/confirm buckets.
assertions: The response recognizes this as a skill inventory cleanup request.
The response includes usage + redundancy + recommendation components.
The response proposes a reversible disable script instead of direct deletion.

evals.expected_output: Triggers skill-health-audit and outputs a Chinese skill health report with reasoned cleanup suggestions.
assertions: The response uses a report-style structure for skill cleanup.
The response includes explicit reasons for each recommendation.
The response asks for confirmation before executing cleanup actions.

evals.prompt: Please compare these two README files for style consistency.
evals.expected_output: Should not trigger skill-health-audit because the task is generic docs editing, not skills inventory governance.
assertions: The skill is not preferred for generic README editing.
No forced cleanup report should be generated for unrelated tasks.
